title: Sales of Valve's Steam Deck crater after recent price hike
summary: Boiling Steam attributes this marked sales dip to a price increase that has “completely shut down demand for the Steam Deck.” And it’s likely that the Steam Deck’s historical $400 to $649 price range was much more attractive to consumers than the…
